Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Jan-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Espey for Jessie Davis.

Ms. Espey stated that she has the final inventory back from the Referee, that she needs to have her Client sign it and that she is close to completing the petition for final distribution. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to January 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
